name: Jewelry Box Storage Tower - Brightroom™
description:
Dressing up for the day will be a breeze with your jewelry sorted and organized in one spot with the Jewelry Box Storage Tower from Brightroom™. This jewelry box comes with multiple compartments, rods, and pegs to give you ample space for your earrings, rings, bracelets, and more, and the built-in mirror makes getting ready much easier. Made with a wooden frame, this storage tower makes a perfect addition to your vanity.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
